title: Heritage Railway & Travel Landing Page Template
description: A sophisticated mountain railway template designed for luxury travel, scenic journeys, and heritage tourism brands.

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; export default function Header() { const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false); // Close menu on resize to avoid weird states useEffect(() => { const handleResize = () => { if (window.innerWidth > 991 && isOpen) { setIsOpen(false); } }; window.addEventListener('resize', handleResize); return () => window.removeEventListener('resize', handleResize); }, [isOpen]); return (

import React from 'react'; export default function Departures() { const journeys = [ { id: 1, title: "Spring Blossom Express", date: "April 12 – May 25, 2026", desc: "Wind through cherry-lined valleys on our most beloved seasonal route. The Spring Blossom Express departs twice daily during peak bloom, with onboard botanist commentary and a complimentary blossom tea service.", img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1517760444937-f6397edcbbcd?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80", labels: ["Cascade Line"], delay: "0.18" }, { id: 2, title: "Twilight Dining Car", date: "Every Friday & Saturday, May – September", desc: "Board our restored 1924 Pullman dining car for a five-course dinner as the sun sets over the Cascade peaks. Local wines paired with Pacific Northwest cuisine by Chef Elena Vasquez.", img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1504280390367-361c6d9f38f4?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80", labels: ["Cascade Line"], delay: "0.30" }, { id: 3, title: "Heritage Engine Workshop", date: "Second Saturday of every month", desc: "Go behind the scenes at our roundhouse restoration workshop. Learn about steam engine mechanics, see historic locomotives being rebuilt, and meet the engineers who keep a century of heritage alive.", img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1436491865332-7a61a109cc05?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80", labels: ["Monthly", "Cascade Line"], delay: "0.42" } ]; return (

import React from 'react'; export default function JourneyReports() { const reports = [ { id: 1, vol: "Vol.01", season: "October 2025 — Summit Route", title: "Autumn Foliage Journey", text: "Two days of autumn splendor along our Summit Route — golden maples, crisp mountain air, and a complimentary cider service as the valley turns amber below.", img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1476820865390-c52aeebb9891?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1000&q=80", delay: "0.12" }, { id: 2, vol: "Vol.02", season: "August 2025 — Roundhouse, Cascade Depot", title: "Engineer for a Day", text: "Hands-on with our 1928 Baldwin locomotive — fire the boiler, read the gauges, sound the whistle. A full morning inside a living museum of steam and steel.", img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1477959858617-67f85cf4f1df?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1000&q=80", delay: "0.24" }, { id: 3, vol: "Vol.03", season: "September 2025 — Cascade Dining Car", title: "Harvest Table", text: "Thirty local producers. Five courses. One restored Pullman dining car rolling at sixty miles per hour through the harvest valley as the light fades over the peaks.", img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1447752875215-b2761acb3c5d?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1000&q=80", delay: "0.36" } ]; return (

seo_title: Heritage Railway & Travel Landing Page Template
seo_description: A sophisticated mountain railway template designed for luxury travel, scenic journeys, and heritage tourism brands.
seo_keywords: Travel, Landing Page, Services, Clean, Minimal, Dark, Style
long_description:
## Elegant Heritage Tourism
This premium landing page template is tailored for **luxury travel** and **scenic tourism** brands. It features a sophisticated, nature-inspired palette and high-end typography to evoke a sense of history and timeless elegance. 

- **Immersive Hero Section:** Includes multi-layered parallax-ready visuals and a dynamic 'Next Departure' widget.
- **Content-Rich Sections:** Beautifully designed areas for 'The Story', 'Our Fleet', and 'Heritage' ensure your brand's legacy is the focus.
- **Journey Highlights:** Interactive card layouts for upcoming departures with date, category, and feature labels.
- **Culinary & Event Modules:** Dedicated spots for dining car experiences and private event charters.
- **Passenger Stories:** A 'Field Notes' blog section for community engagement and SEO-driven content.

Ideal for train companies, specialized tour operators, and boutique hospitality services looking for a **refined and professional online presence**.
